architecture.type: U-Net (Ronneberger et al.), trained from scratch
architecture.encoder: 4x DoubleConv (Conv3x3-BN-ReLU x2) + maxpool blocks, channels 32->64->128->256->512, no pretrained backbone
architecture.decoder: 4x ConvTranspose2d upsample + skip-concat + DoubleConv, mirrored back to 32 channels
architecture.output_head: 1x1 conv -> 1 channel logits (sigmoid applied at inference, not inside the model)

output: binary segmentation mask, 1 channel, same 224x224 spatial size as input

normalization.scale: pixel values divided by 255.0 before normalization
normalization.note: standard ImageNet stats, applied per-channel RGB

val_metrics_note: recomputed directly from unet_best.pth on the 135-image validation set; per-epoch history was not persisted to disk during training. Checkpoint's own stored val_dice at save time was 0.8132 (batch-mean aggregation vs per-image mean here, consistent within rounding).
per_stage_note: computed on the held-out test set (160 images), not validation. fruiting is weakest (smallest class, expected occlusion by fruit).
